name: Loan For Any Purpose
description_short: Loan For Any Purpose is a multi-product lender in Detroit, MI offering cash advances, title loans, payday loans, and personal loans up to $50,000 for all credit types.
description_long:
Loan For Any Purpose is a consumer lending company with a physical branch at 3403 Grand River Ave #200 in Detroit, Michigan, and a second location in Atlanta, Georgia. The company operates seven days a week with extended weekday hours (7am–8pm Monday through Friday, 9am–6pm on weekends), positioning itself as an accessible storefront lender for borrowers who need in-person service or fast funding outside traditional bank hours.

The company offers a broad suite of lending products spanning short-term and medium-term needs. Cash advances and payday loans serve borrowers needing under $1,000 quickly. Installment loans cover the $1,000–$5,000 range for those who need slightly more with structured repayments. Title loans — secured by a vehicle's title — allow borrowing up to $50,000, and personal loans also extend to $50,000 for applicants with higher credit scores. Nearly all products are marketed as open to "all credit types," with the exception of personal loans, which carry a note that a higher credit score is recommended.

What distinguishes Loan For Any Purpose from banks and credit unions is its explicit all-credit-types positioning and same-day funding claims. The application does not affect a borrower's FICO score — the company may instead query a non-traditional consumer reporting agency. Hours are designed around working-class schedules, and the minimum documentation requirement for same-day loans reduces friction for urgent borrowers. The company is PATRIOT Act compliant and includes standard AML identity verification at account opening.

Honestly assessed, Loan For Any Purpose is a short-term and subprime lending shop — not a long-term financial partner. Their own disclaimer states the products "are designed to meet short-term financial needs" and they explicitly recommend credit counseling for borrowers with ongoing difficulties. Rates, fees, and terms are not published on the website and vary by state and applicant, making comparison shopping difficult. Borrowers with stable credit and time to shop should explore credit unions or online personal loan lenders for better rates.
address: 2300 Gary Farm Blvd, Bowling Green, KY 42104

company_info.headquarters: 2300 Gary Farm Blvd, Bowling Green, KY 42104

pros: Accepts all credit types for most products including cash advances, title loans, and installment loans
Loan amounts span $250 to $50,000 — broad range under one roof
Same-day loan option with minimal documentation required
Applying does not affect your FICO credit score
Open 7 days a week with extended weekday hours (7am–8pm Mon–Fri)
In-person Detroit branch for borrowers who prefer face-to-face service
Title loans allow secured borrowing up to $50,000 for vehicle owners
cons: Rates, fees, and APRs are not disclosed on the website — terms vary by state and applicant
Personal loans (up to $50,000) require a higher credit score, limiting access for bad-credit borrowers
Company's own disclaimer classifies products as short-term only — not a long-term borrowing solution
Non-traditional credit inquiry may appear on your profile with that reporting agency
Online applications may take up to two additional business days if identity verification is required
best_for: Detroit-area borrowers with bad or thin credit who need fast access to $250–$5,000
Vehicle owners seeking a title loan up to $50,000 without a credit score requirement
Borrowers who prefer in-person loan assistance with extended hours including weekends
People needing a quick cash advance under $1,000 with same-day funding
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose suits Detroit-area borrowers with poor or limited credit who need fast access to cash — from a $250 advance up to a $50,000 title loan — and value in-person service with weekend availability. The main caveat is full transparency: rates and terms are not published, the company is explicit that its products serve short-term needs only, and borrowers with decent credit will almost certainly find cheaper options elsewhere.
services: Cash advances (under $1,000, unsecured, all credit types)
Payday loans (up to $1,000, bad credit welcome)
Title loans (up to $50,000, secured by vehicle title)
Personal loans (up to $50,000, higher credit score recommended)
In-person loan applications at Detroit branch
Online loan applications with remote identity verification
